case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. KHRISTOPH CLOUD et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CLOUD, KHRISTOPH DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-26-2010

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-15-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-15-2010 CONTINUED TO MAR-16-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE DEC-15-2010 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CLOUD, KHRISTOPH

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-16-2011 CONTINUED TO MAY-18-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE MAR-16-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $275.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CLOUD, KHRISTOPH
DECLARATION FLINT C. ZIDE FILED RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST EXCESS OF 10% AND ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION FLINT C. ZIDE FILED RE: INTEREST CALCULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
AFFIDAVIT OF LOST INSTRUMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CLOUD, KHRISTOPH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLOUD, KHRISTOPH $2,020.99 PRINCIPAL, $853.80 INTEREST, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,149.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-18-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
